speaker: speaker1
text: Hi , I think I was supposed to call for my test results today .

speaker: speaker2
text: If you go onto our website and put in your password , you can access your test results .

speaker: speaker1
text: Are you saying that there weren ’ t any problems ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I will always have you come in for a discussion if there is a major problem .

speaker: speaker1
text: Will I be able to read the results on the website and understand them ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , if you go there , you can see what each test is about .

speaker: speaker1
text: How will I know what the numbers mean ?

speaker: speaker2
text: You can see your results and how they compare to the normal range .

speaker: speaker1
text: How can I see test results from tests I have taken before ?

speaker: speaker2
text: We put all of your test results up in the same place . Just check the dates for what you need .
